title: artemisia selengensis var. selengensis
intro: Artemisia selengensis var. selengensis, also known as the Mongolian wormwood, is a type of plant that belongs to the genus Artemisia. It is native to the mountainous regions of Asia and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it beneficial for various health issues such as colds, fever, and digestive problems. Artemisia selengensis var. selengensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
